title: swartzia myrtifolia var. standleyi
intro: Swartzia myrtifolia var. standleyi, also known as Guanacaste or Guanacaste tree, is a plant species native to Central America, particularly in the tropical rainforests of Costa Rica and Panama. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Swartzia myrtifolia var. standleyi include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
